TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan putunen ku wang-lu 2026ŚĻīšľäśúóśĖ∑Á∂≤ == tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad wal demiad, itida i Yi-lang tahekal ku tabakiay nu mibelihay tu sihuan, ina Yi-lang sihu putunen ku hamin nu kanatal a singbung kisya atu sadingdingwa aca. nina nipiputunan sapihacengay namaka tusepcaysiw mihcaan, u saahebalay nu hamin a kanatalan tu sapipuu'dan. u makatalay nu micumuday a kawawan, ahebal kina mibelihay atu sihu nu atekak a nikasasakamuan, sisa putun han kina singbungkisya tu pina a demiad, sakay syakay, sakaudip atu kanatal mamin a mapalalid. 2026ŚĻī1śúą8śó•, . sakaudip nu binacadan ŤÉĆśôĮ kaputunan tu pina nu demiadan tu Wang-lu, sakaudip nu Yi-lang, mahetik mawada ku kalisiw, macakat ku canancanan atu sakaudip, sisa katuud ku mibelihay a kawaw kalamkam satu a manayat tu pinaay nu Sen atu tukayan. sayaway nu mihantayay a tademaw u sakaudip sa, nika alaw mala misiluday ku kanatal atu cen-ce a nikabalihenawan atu macaculi. . ina Yi-lang sipakayda i wag-lu amikinsa mipenec tu kalawlawan, amica ku si-hu patalaw tu Yi-lang mibelihay, nika mapalawpes ku sakaudip nu kanatal. . kaydaan Á∂ďťĀé tawya a tuki nu cay bulad wal demiad tu sansandep tu labi walu a tukian, ina wang-lu nu Yi-lang hida satu a mahetik, hatidaay tu nu wang-luan, atu ahebalay nu wang-lu mahamin a maputun. saan ku mikantukay nu NetBlocks sa, hamin nu wang-lu nu matulinay naynai' tu a maadih micapitu sakanai', numahiniay nu Yi-langan mahida u tadeputun tu nu wang-lu. u putun tu nu wang-lu, nu kantal a nipikawawan mapalalid tu. saan ku Yeng-se a nisakamuan, tawya nu demiadan i cay bulad caypic demiad tu sananal nu siwa a tukian aidaw, cacay a tatukian sa maputun aca, nina wang-ci wang-lu a sapidiput alaw u hatidaay tu a pihaceng. NetBlocks . sakay si kawawan nu sasakamuan Śčēś©üŚąÜśěź saan kina Yi-lan " anzin nu kanatal atu pihantayan nu ngalay", saan u mamipuu't tu mihantayay nu masakaputaay makayda i wang-ci-wang-lu ku sakatineng, sapisilud nu kawawan, maminpu't tu hekalay nu milawlaway tu " ada nu icelang" micukaymas tu nika lawlaw nu lalabu a kanatal. saan ku duma mitudu' tu sihu samiputun tu wang-lu taneng " miputun tu mihantayay nu wang-lu tu sapilinlakuan". ". gigicu atu sapikawawśäÄŤ°ďŤąáŚü∑Ť°Ć hamin nu kanatal tu sakaputun nu wang-lu tu picidekan tu kapahay ŚÖ®ŚúčśÄßśĖ∑Á∂≤ÁČĻťĽě nikaputunan tina wang-lu mamin nu hucu a binacadan miala tu wang-ci-wang-lu, micidek ku nipilawlaw tu sapitiyungan tu sulitan, madayumay a hizian atu wi-sin nu wang-ci-wang-lu nu nikawawan. saan ku mikantukay tu cudadan, wang-ci-wang-lu nu miadihay itini i apuyuay nu tukian selep sa a mahetik, saan ina kawawan u sihu kina mikawawy tina " kun-cen-sin-fung-suo". ". Wi-sin-wang-lu atu sapilawlaw Ť°õśėüÁ∂≤Ť∑ĮŤąáŚĻ≤śďĺ syekay atu nikaudip Á§ĺśúÉŤąáÁ∂ďśŅüŚĹĪťüŅ misuayaw tu sakaudip nu sakalalid ŚįćśįĎÁúĺÁĒüśīĽÁöĄŚĹĪťüŅ pihantayan nu kawaw a singbung atu nipatukilan tidaay a sapasingbungan Áē∂ŚúįŚ™íťęĒ adih nu kanatal ŚúčťöõŚŹćśáČ singbungkisya atu masakaputay nu kanatal Ś™íťęĒŤąáŚúčťöõÁĶĄÁĻĒ kanatal nu singbungkisya miadih tina maputunay nu singbungkisya tu nikudan a nipipaculian a kawawan, mucili tu Yi-lang sihu mi'put miputun tu nikatahekalan nu singbung. ina zen-ci masakaputay maynah tu mahiniay a kawawan, palutatengan ku nuheni u miputunay tu kawaw nu paculiay a tademaw atu mi'disay atu mapatayay nu tademawan. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan putun…ôn ku waŇč-r~…ĺu ********* == tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad war~…ĺ d…ômiad, itida i ji-r~…ĺaŇč tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku tabakiaj nu mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj tu sińßuan, ina ji-r~…ĺaŇč sińßu putun…ôn ku ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ a siŇčbuŇč kisja atu sadiŇčdiŇčwa a ¶a. nina nipiputunan sapińßa ¶…ôŇčaj namaka tus…ôp ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan, u saańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu ńßamin a kanatar~…ĺan tu sapipuu Ē~ °dan. u makatar~…ĺaj nu mi ¶umudaj a kawawan, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ kina mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj atu sińßu nu at…ôkak a nikasasakamuan, sisa putun ńßan kina siŇčbuŇčkisja tu pina a d…ômiad, sakaj sjakaj, sakaudip atu kanatar~…ĺ mamin a mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid. *********, . sakaudip nu bina ¶adan ** kaputunan tu pina nu d…ômiadan tu waŇč-r~…ĺu, sakaudip nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč, mańß…ôtik mawada ku kar~…ĺisiw, ma ¶akat ku ¶anan ¶anan atu sakaudip, sisa katuud ku mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj a kawaw kar~…ĺamkam satu a manajat tu pinaaj nu s…ôn atu tukajan. sajawaj nu mińßantajaj a tad…ômaw u sakaudip sa, nika ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺa misir~…ĺudaj ku kanatar~…ĺ atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a nikabar~…ĺińß…ônawan atu ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi. . ina ji-r~…ĺaŇč sipakajda i wag-r~…ĺu amikinsa mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, ami ¶a ku si-ńßu patar~…ĺaw tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj, nika mapar~…ĺawp…ôs ku sakaudip nu kanatar~…ĺ. . kajdaan ** tawja a tuki nu ¶aj bur~…ĺad war~…ĺ d…ômiad tu sansand…ôp tu r~…ĺabi war~…ĺu a tukian, ina waŇč-r~…ĺu nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ńßida satu a mańß…ôtik, ńßatidaaj tu nu waŇč-r~…ĺuan, atu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu waŇč-r~…ĺu mańßamin a maputun. saan ku mikantukaj nu n…ôtbr~…ĺo ¶ks sa, ńßamin nu waŇč-r~…ĺu nu matur~…ĺinaj najnai Ē~ ° tu a maadińß mi ¶apitu sakanai Ē~ °, numańßiniaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇčan mańßida u tad…ôputun tu nu waŇč-r~…ĺu. u putun tu nu waŇč-r~…ĺu, nu kantar~…ĺ a nipikawawan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu. saan ku j…ôŇč-s…ô a nisakamuan, tawja nu d…ômiadan i ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶ajpi ¶ d…ômiad tu sananar~…ĺ nu siwa a tukian aidaw, ¶a ¶aj a tatukian sa maputun a ¶a, nina waŇč- ¶i waŇč-r~…ĺu a sapidiput ar~…ĺaw u ńßatidaaj tu a pińßa ¶…ôŇč. n…ôtbr~…ĺo ¶ks . sakaj si kawawan nu sasakamuan **** saan kina ji-r~…ĺan " anzin nu kanatar~…ĺ atu pińßantajan nu Ňčar~…ĺaj", saan u mamipuu Ē~ °t tu mińßantajaj nu masakaputaaj makajda i waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-r~…ĺu ku sakatin…ôŇč, sapisir~…ĺud nu kawawan, maminpu Ē~ °t tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj tu " ada nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč" mi ¶ukajmas tu nika r~…ĺawr~…ĺaw nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu a kanatar~…ĺ. saan ku duma mitudu Ē~ ° tu sińßu samiputun tu waŇč-r~…ĺu tan…ôŇč " miputun tu mińßantajaj nu waŇč-r~…ĺu tu sapir~…ĺinr~…ĺakuan". ". gigi ¶u atu sapikawaw***** ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ tu sakaputun nu waŇč-r~…ĺu tu pi ¶id…ôkan tu kapańßaj ******* nikaputunan tina waŇč-r~…ĺu mamin nu ńßu ¶u a bina ¶adan miar~…ĺa tu waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-r~…ĺu, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu sapitijuŇčan tu sur~…ĺitan, madajumaj a ńßizian atu wi-sin nu waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-r~…ĺu nu nikawawan. saan ku mikantukaj tu ¶udadan, waŇč- ¶i-waŇč-r~…ĺu nu miadińßaj itini i apujuaj nu tukian s…ôr~…ĺ…ôp sa a mańß…ôtik, saan ina kawawan u sińßu kina mikawawj tina " kun- ¶…ôn-sin-fuŇč-suo". ". wi-sin-waŇč-r~…ĺu atu sapir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ******* sj…ôkaj atu nikaudip ******* misuajaw tu sakaudip nu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺid ******** pińßantajan nu kawaw a siŇčbuŇč atu nipatukir~…ĺan tidaaj a sapasiŇčbuŇčan **** adińß nu kanatar~…ĺ **** siŇčbuŇčkisja atu masakaputaj nu kanatar~…ĺ ******* kanatar~…ĺ nu siŇčbuŇčkisja miadińß tina maputunaj nu siŇčbuŇčkisja tu nikudan a nipipa ¶ur~…ĺian a kawawan, mu ¶ir~…ĺi tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč sińßu mi Ē~ °put miputun tu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu siŇčbuŇč. ina z…ôn- ¶i masakaputaj majnańß tu mańßiniaj a kawawan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku nuńß…ôni u miputunaj tu kawaw nu pa ¶ur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw atu mi Ē~ °disaj atu mapatajaj nu tad…ômawan. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan putunen ku wang-lu 2026ŚĻīšľäśúóśĖ∑Á∂≤ == tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad wal demiad, itida i Yi-lang tahekal ku tabakiay nu mibelihay tu sihuan, ina Yi-lang sihu putunen ku hamin nu kanatal a singbung kisya atu sadingdingwa aca. nina nipiputunan sapihacengay namaka tusepcaysiw mihcaan, u saahebalay nu hamin a kanatalan tu sapipuu'dan. u makatalay nu micumuday a kawawan, ahebal kina mibelihay atu sihu nu atekak a nikasasakamuan, sisa putun han kina singbungkisya tu pina a demiad, sakay syakay, sakaudip atu kanatal mamin a mapalalid. 2026ŚĻī1śúą8śó•, . sakaudip nu binacadan ŤÉĆśôĮ kaputunan tu pina nu demiadan tu Wang-lu, sakaudip nu Yi-lang, mahetik mawada ku kalisiw, macakat ku canancanan atu sakaudip, sisa katuud ku mibelihay a kawaw kalamkam satu a manayat tu pinaay nu Sen atu tukayan. sayaway nu mihantayay a tademaw u sakaudip sa, nika alaw mala misiluday ku kanatal atu cen-ce a nikabalihenawan atu macaculi. . ina Yi-lang sipakayda i wag-lu amikinsa mipenec tu kalawlawan, amica ku si-hu patalaw tu Yi-lang mibelihay, nika mapalawpes ku sakaudip nu kanatal. . kaydaan Á∂ďťĀé tawya a tuki nu cay bulad wal demiad tu sansandep tu labi walu a tukian, ina wang-lu nu Yi-lang hida satu a mahetik, hatidaay tu nu wang-luan, atu ahebalay nu wang-lu mahamin a maputun. saan ku mikantukay nu NetBlocks sa, hamin nu wang-lu nu matulinay naynai' tu a maadih micapitu sakanai', numahiniay nu Yi-langan mahida u tadeputun tu nu wang-lu. u putun tu nu wang-lu, nu kantal a nipikawawan mapalalid tu. saan ku Yeng-se a nisakamuan, tawya nu demiadan i cay bulad caypic demiad tu sananal nu siwa a tukian aidaw, cacay a tatukian sa maputun aca, nina wang-ci wang-lu a sapidiput alaw u hatidaay tu a pihaceng. NetBlocks . sakay si kawawan nu sasakamuan Śčēś©üŚąÜśěź saan kina Yi-lan " anzin nu kanatal atu pihantayan nu ngalay", saan u mamipuu't tu mihantayay nu masakaputaay makayda i wang-ci-wang-lu ku sakatineng, sapisilud nu kawawan, maminpu't tu hekalay nu milawlaway tu " ada nu icelang" micukaymas tu nika lawlaw nu lalabu a kanatal. saan ku duma mitudu' tu sihu samiputun tu wang-lu taneng " miputun tu mihantayay nu wang-lu tu sapilinlakuan". ". gigicu atu sapikawawśäÄŤ°ďŤąáŚü∑Ť°Ć hamin nu kanatal tu sakaputun nu wang-lu tu picidekan tu kapahay ŚÖ®ŚúčśÄßśĖ∑Á∂≤ÁČĻťĽě nikaputunan tina wang-lu mamin nu hucu a binacadan miala tu wang-ci-wang-lu, micidek ku nipilawlaw tu sapitiyungan tu sulitan, madayumay a hizian atu wi-sin nu wang-ci-wang-lu nu nikawawan. saan ku mikantukay tu cudadan, wang-ci-wang-lu nu miadihay itini i apuyuay nu tukian selep sa a mahetik, saan ina kawawan u sihu kina mikawawy tina " kun-cen-sin-fung-suo". ". Wi-sin-wang-lu atu sapilawlaw Ť°õśėüÁ∂≤Ť∑ĮŤąáŚĻ≤śďĺ syekay atu nikaudip Á§ĺśúÉŤąáÁ∂ďśŅüŚĹĪťüŅ misuayaw tu sakaudip nu sakalalid ŚįćśįĎÁúĺÁĒüśīĽÁöĄŚĹĪťüŅ pihantayan nu kawaw a singbung atu nipatukilan tidaay a sapasingbungan Áē∂ŚúįŚ™íťęĒ adih nu kanatal ŚúčťöõŚŹćśáČ singbungkisya atu masakaputay nu kanatal Ś™íťęĒŤąáŚúčťöõÁĶĄÁĻĒ kanatal nu singbungkisya miadih tina maputunay nu singbungkisya tu nikudan a nipipaculian a kawawan, mucili tu Yi-lang sihu mi'put miputun tu nikatahekalan nu singbung. ina zen-ci masakaputay maynah tu mahiniay a kawawan, palutatengan ku nuheni u miputunay tu kawaw nu paculiay a tademaw atu mi'disay atu mapatayay nu tademawan. .

ina ji-r~…ĺaŇč sińßu putun…ôn ku ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ a siŇčbuŇč kisja atu sadiŇčdiŇčwa a ¶a. nina nipiputunan sapińßa ¶…ôŇčaj namaka tus…ôp ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan, u saańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu ńßamin a matur~…ĺinaj najnai Ē~ ° tu a maadińß mi ¶apitu sakanai Ē~ °, numańßiniaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇčan mańßida u tad…ôputun tu nu waŇč-r~…ĺu. u putun tu nu waŇč-r~…ĺu, nu kantar~…ĺ a nipikawawan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid
